---
title: "Ransi Clark"
subtitle: "Computational Social Science"
# 
image: profileadd.jpg
about: # https://quarto.org/docs/websites/website-about.html
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/ransiw
    - icon: bookmark-fill
      text: Substack
      href: https://counterfictionals.substack.com/
---

I specialize in statistical methods for estimating dynamic causal effects, with focus on decomposability. I apply these methods to a wide range of treatment settings including democratization, natural disasters, and other electorally relevant phenomena. I publish and maintain open source software.

I also have a specific policy interest in nuclear energy and occasionally field surveys to gauge public opinion on the nuclear energy permitting processes.

With [Matt Estes](https://matt-estes.com/publications), I quantify the relationship between legal academia and legal practicioners by employing natural language processing tools in legal text data spanning the last decades. 

## Accepted Papers

[didunit: a unit-level multi-period differences-in-differences estimator in R](didunit.pdf)<br>
*with Jonathan N. Katz and R. Michael Alvarez*<br>
*published at [SoftwareX](https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S2352711025004339)*


[Threat of China's nuclear dominance boosts Americans' support for nuclear energy](NuclearPolitics.pdf) 
*with Beatrice Magistro and R. Michael Alvarez*<br>
*accepted at Energy Policy*


[Courting the Academy: The Judicial Role in Popularizing Legal Scholarship](legalbounds.pdf) 
*with Matthew Estes* <br>
*accepted at Kansas Journal of Law and Public Policy*



## Working Papers

[Saturation dangers in multi-decade democracy studies](democeducation.pdf) 
*with Jonathan N. Katz*


[Schooling amidst displacement from California fires: bright spots and blind spots](schoolswildfire.pdf) 
*with R. Michael Alvarez*

[Finding Natural Law: An empirical examination](FindingNature.pdf) 
*with Matthew Estes* 


## Education

California Institute of Technology \| PhD Social Science \| 2021-

University of Queensland \| BEcon (Honours) \| 2015-2018
